simple_types.name: CMDR_ATACS_Field
simple_types.code:
type CMDR_ATACS_Field is
   NORMAL,
   COMPLETION)
  with Size => 1;

enumeration_literals.name: NORMAL
enumeration_literals.description:
This bit indicates that a completion signal is expected within a programmed
amount of time (HSMCI_CSTOR).

simple_types.name: CMDR_IOSPCMD_Field
simple_types.code:
type CMDR_IOSPCMD_Field is
   STD,
   SUSPEND,
   RESUME)
  with Size => 2;

simple_types.name: CMDR_MAXLAT_Field
simple_types.code:
type CMDR_MAXLAT_Field is
   Val_5,
   Val_64)
  with Size => 1;

simple_types.name: CMDR_OPDCMD_Field
simple_types.code:
type CMDR_OPDCMD_Field is
   PUSHPULL,
   OPENDRAIN)
  with Size => 1;

simple_types.name: CMDR_RSPTYP_Field
simple_types.code:
type CMDR_RSPTYP_Field is
   NORESP,
   Val_48_BIT,
   Val_136_BIT,
   R1B)
  with Size => 2;

simple_types.name: CMDR_SPCMD_Field
simple_types.code:
type CMDR_SPCMD_Field is
   STD,
   INIT,
   SYNC,
   CE_ATA,
   IT_CMD,
   IT_RESP,
   BOR,
   EBO)
  with Size => 3;

enumeration_literals.name: STD
enumeration_literals.description: Initialization CMD: 74 clock cycles for initialization sequence.

enumeration_literals.name: INIT
enumeration_literals.description:
Synchronized CMD: Wait for the end of the current data block transfer
before sending the pending command.

enumeration_literals.name: SYNC
enumeration_literals.description:
CE-ATA Completion Signal disable Command. The host cancels the ability for
the device to return a command completion signal on the command line.

enumeration_literals.name: CE_ATA
enumeration_literals.description: Interrupt command: Corresponds to the Interrupt Mode (CMD40).

enumeration_literals.name: IT_CMD
enumeration_literals.description: Interrupt response: Corresponds to the Interrupt Mode (CMD40).

enumeration_literals.name: IT_RESP
enumeration_literals.description:
Boot Operation Request. Start a boot operation mode, the host processor can
read boot data from the MMC device directly.

enumeration_literals.name: BOR
enumeration_literals.description:
End Boot Operation. This command allows the host processor to terminate the
boot operation mode.

simple_types.name: CMDR_TRCMD_Field
simple_types.code:
type CMDR_TRCMD_Field is
   NO_DATA,
   START_DATA,
   STOP_DATA)
  with Size => 2;

simple_types.name: CMDR_TRDIR_Field
simple_types.code:
type CMDR_TRDIR_Field is
   WRITE,
   READ)
  with Size => 1;

simple_types.name: CMDR_TRTYP_Field
simple_types.code:
type CMDR_TRTYP_Field is
   SINGLE,
   MULTIPLE,
   STREAM,
   BYTE,
   BLOCK)
  with Size => 3;

simple_types.name: CSTOR_CSTOMUL_Field
simple_types.code:
type CSTOR_CSTOMUL_Field is
   Val_1,
   Val_16,
   Val_128,
   Val_256,
   Val_1024,
   Val_4096,
   Val_65536,
   Val_1048576)
  with Size => 3;

simple_types.name: DMA_CHKSIZE_Field
simple_types.code:
type DMA_CHKSIZE_Field is
   Val_1,
   Val_4)
  with Size => 1;

simple_types.name: DTOR_DTOMUL_Field
simple_types.code:
type DTOR_DTOMUL_Field is
   Val_1,
   Val_16,
   Val_128,
   Val_256,
   Val_1024,
   Val_4096,
   Val_65536,
   Val_1048576)
  with Size => 3;

simple_types.name: SDCR_SDCBUS_Field
simple_types.code:
type SDCR_SDCBUS_Field is
   Val_1,
   Val_4,
   Val_8)
  with Size => 2;

simple_types.name: SDCR_SDCSEL_Field
simple_types.code:
type SDCR_SDCSEL_Field is
   SLOTA,
   SLOTB,
   SLOTC,
   SLOTD)
  with Size => 2;

simple_types.name: WPMR_WPKEY_Field
simple_types.code:
type WPMR_WPKEY_Field is
   WPMR_WPKEY_Field_Reset,
   PASSWD)
  with Size => 24;

enumeration_literals.name: WPMR_WPKEY_Field_Reset
enumeration_literals.description:
Writing any other value in this field aborts the write operation of the
WPEN bit.Always reads as 0.
